dev.jeka.core.api.tooling.maven

Class JkMavenProject

  • java.lang.Object
    • dev.jeka.core.api.tooling.maven.JkMavenProject

  • public class JkMavenProject
extends java.lang.Object
    Represents a Maven project with various utility methods for performing common tasks.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      java.nio.file.Path baseDir 

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Static Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      JkMvn cleanInstall()
      Returns a new JkMvn instance to perform a clean install.
      JkMvn cleanPackage()
      Returns a new JkMvn instance to perform a clean package.
      java.lang.String getDependenciesAsTxt()
      Returns the dependencies of this Maven project as a formatted string suitable to be copy/pasted in jeka/project-dependencies.txt file.
      java.lang.String getDependencyAsJeKaCode(int codeIndent)
      Returns the project's dependencies as JeKa code.
      JkMvn mvn()
      Returns a new instance of JkMvn to perform Maven commands on this project.
      static JkMavenProject of(java.nio.file.Path baseDir) 
      JkQualifiedDependencySet readDependencies()
      Returns the dependencies of this Maven project

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Field Detail

      • baseDir

        public final java.nio.file.Path baseDir

    • Method Detail

      • of

        public static JkMavenProject of(java.nio.file.Path baseDir)

      • cleanPackage

        public JkMvn cleanPackage()
        Returns a new JkMvn instance to perform a clean package.

      • cleanInstall

        public JkMvn cleanInstall()
        Returns a new JkMvn instance to perform a clean install.

      • readDependencies

        public JkQualifiedDependencySet readDependencies()
        Returns the dependencies of this Maven project

      • getDependencyAsJeKaCode

        public java.lang.String getDependencyAsJeKaCode(int codeIndent)
        Returns the project's dependencies as JeKa code.
        Parameters:
        codeIndent - The number of spaces for each indentation level in the generated code.

      • getDependenciesAsTxt

        public java.lang.String getDependenciesAsTxt()
        Returns the dependencies of this Maven project as a formatted string suitable to be copy/pasted in jeka/project-dependencies.txt file.

      • mvn

        public JkMvn mvn()
        Returns a new instance of JkMvn to perform Maven commands on this project.
